mapper.insert: insert into orders( order_no, user_id, status, total_price, payment_method, created_at, updated_at, remark, user_delete, merchant_delete ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{paymentMethod}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{remark}, #{userDelete}, #{merchantDelete} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.category as category, COUNT(*) as count FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND o.status IN (1, 2, 3, 4) AND o.merchant_delete = 0 AND p.category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY count DESC
